title: China A-Share
description: Real-time and historical market data for Chinese A-shares (Shanghai/Shenzhen/Beijing) backed by the akshare library — quotes, K-lines, indices, boards, capital flow, news, announcements, financials, and trading-day calendar.

get_quote.title: Get Quote
get_quote.description: Real-time spot quote (price, change, volume, P/E, P/B, market cap) for one or more A-shares.

get_kline.title: Get K-Line
get_kline.description: Daily/weekly/monthly OHLCV bars for a single A-share, with forward/back adjustment.

get_index.title: Get Index
get_index.description: Spot value (and optional 30-day history) for major Chinese stock indices.

get_board.title: Get Board
get_board.description: Industry / concept board snapshot ranked by intraday percentage change.

get_capital_flow.title: Get Capital Flow
get_capital_flow.description: Net capital inflow/outflow for an individual stock or the whole market.

get_news.title: Get News
get_news.description: Recent news for a specific A-share or top macro financial headlines.

get_announcement.title: Get Announcement
get_announcement.description: Listed-company announcements (公告) for a given date.

get_financials.title: Get Financials
get_financials.description: Key financial metrics (EPS, ROE, profit, revenue, margins) by reporting period.

is_trading_day.title: Is Trading Day
is_trading_day.description: Check whether a given date is an A-share trading day. Use at the top of every scheduled task to skip holidays.

states.description: States for each cn_stock skill (disabled, public, or private)
